meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Minimi
products.tagline: Your ambient memory for Claude
products.summaryZh: 你的环境记忆，专为Claude设计
products.descriptionZh: 每个出色的Claude回答都始于上下文。Minimi能监听你Mac上的所有内容——文档、通话、消息、标签页——为Claude提供完整背景。无需提示。全程在设备端运行，保护隐私。
products.description: Every great Claude response starts with context. Minimi listens across your Mac - docs, calls, messages, tabs - and gives Claude the full picture. No prompting. All on-device and private.

products.name: Leni
products.tagline: The world’s most accurate AI for investors
products.summaryZh: 全球最精准的投资者AI
products.descriptionZh: Leni是专为严肃投资工作打造的最准确、可验证的AI。它基于21,000多条决策轨迹构建，每日处理超过1亿行数据，通过来源链接、时间戳和可靠对标，提供具备完全可审计性的金融级输出。在准确性、建模和估值方面的独立基准测试中，Leni的表现优于GPT、Claude和Manus，同时在涉及数百万资金的关键决策中，为团队提供所需的信任。Leni是谷歌初创企业计划的一部分，是投资者值得信赖的严谨工具。
products.description: Leni is the most accurate and verifiable AI for serious investment work. Built on 21,000+ decision traces and processing 100M+ rows daily, it delivers finance-grade outputs with full auditability through source links, timestamps, and grounded comps. Leni outperforms GPT, Claude, and Manus on independent benchmarks for accuracy, modeling, and valuation while giving teams the trust they need when millions are on the line. Leni is part of Google Startups and a serious machine for investors.

products.name: Veltrix AI
products.tagline: AI finance copilot for cash flow, margins, and growth
products.summaryZh: AI财务助手，助力现金流、利润与增长
products.descriptionZh: Veltrix AI 让创始人和财务团队即时掌握现金流、盈利能力、烧钱率及业务表现。连接 QuickBooks、Xero、Shopify、Square 和 HubSpot 后，用日常英语提出财务问题，即可获得有数据来源支持的答案、异常提示及下一步建议。用实时财务智能取代混乱的电子表格和静态仪表板，助您更快做出更明智的商业决策。
products.description: Veltrix AI gives founders and finance teams instant clarity on cash flow, profitability, burn, and business performance. Connect QuickBooks, Xero, Shopify, Square, and HubSpot, then ask finance questions in plain English to get source-backed answers, anomalies, and recommended next steps. Replace spreadsheet chaos and static dashboards with real-time financial intelligence built to help you make faster, smarter business decisions.

products.name: Ideogram 4.0
products.tagline: Generate design-ready image with open weight, layout control
products.summaryZh: 使用开放权重生成设计就绪的图像，布局可控
products.descriptionZh: Ideogram 4.0 是一个从零开始训练的开放权重文生图模型，具备边界框布局控制、多语言文本渲染和原生2K输出能力。面向基于视觉AI进行开发的开发者和企业。
products.description: Ideogram 4.0 is an open-weight text-to-image model trained from scratch, with bounding-box layout control, multilingual text rendering, and native 2K output. For developers and enterprises building on visual AI.

products.name: Agent Mode on Arena
products.tagline: Get real-world tasks done with autonomous AI agents
products.summaryZh: 使用自主AI智能体完成真实世界的任务
products.descriptionZh: 大多数AI基准测试在受控环境中评估模型。代理模式则通过复杂任务测试模型，以提升工作效率。运行自主代理，使其从单一提示出发，完成浏览、研究、编码、文件操作及多步骤工作流。随后逐步观察每个工作流的展开过程。每次运行结果均计入代理竞技场排行榜，依据真实场景下的代理性能对前沿模型进行排名。
products.description: Most AI benchmarks test models in controlled environments. Agent Mode tests them on complex tasks to get more work done. Run autonomous agents that browse, research, code, use files, and complete multi-step workflows from a single prompt. Then watch each workflow unfold step by step. Every run contributes to the Agent Arena Leaderboard, ranking frontier models by real-world agentic performance.

products.name: Nemotron 3 Ultra by NVIDIA
products.tagline: Powers faster, efficient reasoning for long-running agents
products.summaryZh: 为长时间运行的智能体提供更快、高效的推理能力
products.descriptionZh: 一款专为长时间运行智能体打造的550B MoE前沿智能开源模型。相比其他开源前沿模型，其推理速度提升5倍，复杂智能体任务成本降低高达30%。Ultra在编程、深度研究等复杂任务中表现卓越。长时间运行的智能体将时间用于规划、工具使用、故障恢复及下一步决策。
products.description: A 550B MoE frontier-intelligence open model built for long-running agents. It delivers 5x faster inference and lowers the cost of complex agentic tasks by up to 30% versus other open frontier models.Ultra excels at complex tasks like coding and deep research. Long-running agents spend their time planning, using tools, recovering from failures, and deciding what to do next.

products.name: Moodloom
products.tagline: Ad-free Pinterest Alternative with AI content filtering
products.summaryZh: 无广告的Pinterest替代方案，具备AI内容过滤功能
products.descriptionZh: Moodloom 是一个无广告的视觉发现平台，专为厌倦 Pinterest 的用户打造。在这里，你可以保存和探索时尚、家居装饰与艺术内容——没有干扰。它的独特之处在于：纯净信息流——无广告、无赞助帖子；AI 内容过滤——可隐藏或显示 AI 生成的图片。专为希望 Pinterest 变得更好的时尚爱好者、家居装饰师和数字艺术家设计。我们还开发了“保存到 Moodloom”扩展程序，你可以用它将所有 Pinterest 图钉/画板导入 Moodloom。
products.description: Moodloom is an ad-free visual discovery platform for those fed up of Pinterest. Save and explore fashion, decor, and art - without the noise. What makes it different: Clean feed - no ads, no sponsored posts AI content filter - hide or show AI-generated images For fashion lovers, decorators & digital artists who wish Pinterest were better. We have built Save to Moodloom Extension as well using which you can Import all your Pinterest pins/boards to Moodloom.

products.name: LocalClicky
products.tagline: Control your Mac with your voice locally
products.summaryZh: 在本地用语音控制你的 Mac
products.descriptionZh: LocalClicky 是一款 Mac 菜单栏应用，让你能与电脑进行真实对话——完全离线。说出“Computer”即可开始会话。它会持续聆听。你可以连续下达指令。结束时说“goodbye”。一切都在你的设备上运行：语音转录、LLM 多模型、VAD、macOS 语音合成。无需 API 密钥。无需订阅。数据不会离开你的 Mac。采用 MIT 许可协议。
products.description: LocalClicky is a Mac menubar app that lets you have a real conversation with your computer - completely offline. Say "Computer" to start a session. It stays listening. You chain commands back to back. Say "goodbye" when you're done. Everything runs on your machine: voice transcription, LLM multi models, VAD, macOS say No API keys. No subscription. No data leaving your Mac. MIT licensed.

products.name: FloatPic
products.tagline: Ultra-minimalist, borderless macOS native image viewer
products.summaryZh: 超极简无边框macOS原生图片查看器
products.descriptionZh: FloatPic 是极致简约的 macOS 原生图片查看器。无边框浮动窗口、原生手势、极速加载，支持 30 余种图片格式。让软件隐去，让图片浮现。
products.description: FloatPic is the ultra-minimalist macOS native image viewer. Borderless floating window, native gestures, blazing-fast loading, supports 30+ image formats. Make the software disappear, let images float.

products.name: Agent Browser Shield
products.tagline: Block prompt inject & cut token costs for AI browser agents
products.summaryZh: 阻止提示注入并降低AI浏览器代理的令牌成本
products.descriptionZh: AI代理在浏览网页时面临一个问题：它们会读取所有内容——包括Cookie横幅、隐藏指令、暗黑模式——却无法区分真实内容和陷阱。Agent Browser Shield位于你的代理与网页之间，能够剥离提示注入、遮蔽个人身份信息、移除暗黑模式，并过滤消耗Token的页面噪音。该工具免费、源代码开放，兼容browser-use和Browserbase。
products.description: AI agents browsing the web have a problem: they read everything — cookie banners, hidden instructions, dark patterns — and can't tell real content from a trap. Agent Browser Shield sits between your agent and the web, stripping prompt injections, masking PII, removing dark patterns, and filtering page noise that burns tokens. Free, source-available, works with browser-use and Browserbase.

products.name: Microsoft MAI-Voice-2
products.tagline: Expressive TTS with voice cloning in 15 languages
products.summaryZh: 支持15种语言、带声音克隆的情感化TTS
products.descriptionZh: 微软迄今最具表现力的TTS模型——支持短样本语音克隆、细粒度情感控制，并在15种语言中保持一致的语音身份。现已在Azure AI Foundry上线，价格为每百万字符22美元，集成功能将陆续在VSCode、Dynamics 365 Contact Center和Teams中推出。适用于需要生产级韵律但不想承担OpenAI Realtime API成本的语音代理构建者。
products.description: Microsoft's most expressive TTS model yet — voice cloning from short samples, fine-grained emotional control, and consistent voice identity across 15 languages. Now live in Azure AI Foundry at $22 per million characters, with integrations rolling out in VSCode, Dynamics 365 Contact Center, and Teams. For builders shipping voice agents who need production-grade prosody without the OpenAI Realtime API price tag.

products.name: Treadmill Pro
products.tagline: Control your treadmill from your iPhone, wirelessly
products.summaryZh: 通过iPhone无线控制你的跑步机
products.descriptionZh: 通过蓝牙连接跑步机，即可直接在iPhone上控制速度、坡度、计时器并查看运动数据。全面支持Apple Health健康数据同步。App Store免费下载。
products.description: Connect your treadmill via Bluetooth and control speed, incline, timer and stats right from your iPhone. Full Apple Health integration. Free on the App Store.

products.name: Lumo Studios
products.tagline: Build Decks that Speak for Themselves
products.summaryZh: 打造会自己说话的牌组
products.descriptionZh: 好创意值得好幻灯片。LUMO 利用 AI 将你的想法瞬间转化为精美、精准、如你所愿的演示文稿。LUMO 在数秒内将你的创意变成漂亮的演示。通过提示生成幻灯片，在画布编辑器中优化，并与团队分享——一切尽在同一平台。
products.description: Great ideas deserve great slides. LUMO uses AI to turn your thinking into polished decks instantly, beautifully, and exactly the way you want them. LUMO turns your ideas into beautiful presentations in seconds. Generate slides from a prompt, refine them in the canvas editor, and share with your team - all in one place.

products.name: Clarafy
products.tagline: Type messy and have it instantly polished
products.summaryZh: 输入杂乱，即刻润色
products.descriptionZh: 大多数工具强迫你编辑。Clarafy是一款零建议的混沌翻译器。输入或口述一段杂乱无章的意识流，按下快捷键，它就能立即将文本改写为完美内容并替换原处。突出功能：应用感知：根据Gmail、Slack或ChatGPT的上下文自动调整格式。按住口述：大声说出想法，松开即可注入精炼文字。语调匹配：学习并模仿你独特的表达风格。无建议，无下划线。只需一次操作，即可获得清晰表达。
products.description: Most tools force you to edit. Clarafy is a zero-suggestion chaos translator. Type or dictate a messy stream-of-consciousness, hit a hotkey, and it instantly rewrites perfect text in place. Standout Features: App-Aware: Formats contextually for Gmail, Slack, or ChatGPT. Hold-to-Dictate: Ramble out loud; release to inject polished prose. Tone Matching: Learns and mirrors your unique voice. No suggestions, no underlines. Just one-and-done clarity.

products.name: Recursi
products.tagline: Self improving vibe coding env with no API fees
products.summaryZh: 无需API费用的自改进式氛围编码环境
products.descriptionZh: 一个极为强大的氛围编程环境，让你能高效使用基于网页的聊天机器人（通过aistudio使用Claude/Gemini/ChatGPT等），同时严格遵守其服务条款。大量应用作为示例/模板提供，包括一个YouTube播放列表应用，不仅能让你在没有广告的情况下获得出色的YouTube体验（同样在服务条款范围内！），还有一款与MIDI钢琴配合使用的“钢琴版吉他英雄”。更多功能不胜枚举。
products.description: An extremely powerful environment for vibe coding, allowing you to use web based chatbots (Claude/Gemini via aistudio/ChatGPT, etc) extremely efficiently while staying firmly in their terms of service. A whole lot of apps are provided as samples / templates, including a YouTube playlist app that not only allows a great YouTube experience without ads (also within terms of service!), but "Guitar Hero for piano" that works with a MIDI piano. So much more.

products.name: Cleo Atlas Legal API
products.tagline: The world's regulations, machine-readable.
products.summaryZh: 全球法规，机器可读。
products.descriptionZh: Cleo Atlas 将覆盖177个司法管辖区的超过256,000条法规转化为一个机器可读的API。提供两种图谱：产品图谱（涵盖化妆品、器械、食品、玩具、电子产品）和全球图谱（涵盖金融、人工智能、数据、ESG）。可查询任何地区的任何法律。由Cleo Labs构建。
products.description: Cleo Atlas turns 256,000+ regulations across 177 jurisdictions into one machine-readable API. Two atlases: Product (cosmetics, devices, food, toys, electronics) and Global (finance, AI, data, ESG). Query any law, anywhere. Built by Cleo Labs.

products.name: Liance
products.tagline: Connect systems. Collect proof. Stay audit ready.
products.summaryZh: 连接系统。收集证据。保持审计就绪。
products.descriptionZh: Liance 通过连接系统、收集证据、追踪控制，并在审查之间持续推动合规工作，帮助初创企业保持审计就绪状态。
products.description: Liance helps startups stay audit ready by connecting systems, collecting evidence, tracking controls, and keeping compliance work moving between reviews.

products.name: SellerClaw
products.tagline: A team of AI agents that runs your stores across channels
products.summaryZh: 跨渠道管理店铺的AI智能体团队
products.descriptionZh: 经营一家网店本身就是一份全职工作。SellerClaw 是一支为你代运营的 AI 智能体团队：由你指挥的主管协调产品采购、店铺管理和广告投放等专业智能体。告诉它卖什么——智能体会创建商品列表、管理广告和定价，并在 Shopify、eBay 等多个平台处理物流和客服。你始终掌握控制权：每项操作都可见且可审批，自主设定自动化程度。免费起步。
products.description: Running even one online store is a full-time job. SellerClaw is a team of AI agents that runs it for you: specialized agents for product sourcing, store management, and advertising, coordinated by a supervisor you direct. Tell it what to sell — the agents build listings, manage ads and pricing, and handle fulfillment and support across Shopify, eBay, and more. You stay in control: every action is visible and approvable, and you set how much runs on its own. Free to start.

products.name: VisionSync
products.tagline: Where strategy execution meets the people doing the work
products.summaryZh: 当战略执行与执行者相遇。
products.descriptionZh: 现有工具能帮你撰写战略计划，而VisionSync确保计划真正落地。它将每个目标与执行者关联，并实时展示各项举措的进展状态，让领导者在问题影响季度业绩之前——而非之后——就能发现哪些环节出现滞后。搭配ValueSync 360，可从人员维度将战略与绩效相连接。该方案已在内布拉斯加大学所有四个校区、玛丽维尔大学以及大奥马哈商会得到验证。
products.description: Existing tools help you write a strategic plan. VisionSync makes sure it actually happens. It links every goal to the people executing it and shows the live status of each initiative, so leaders see what's slipping before it hits quarterly results, not after. Add ValueSync 360 to connect strategy to performance on the people side. Proven across all four University of Nebraska campuses, Maryville University, and the Greater Omaha Chamber of Commerce.

products.name: English Jobs
products.tagline: English jobs in Europe. No local language needed
products.summaryZh: 欧洲英语岗位，无需本地语言要求
products.descriptionZh: english-jobs.com 助你在欧洲找到英语岗位。无需掌握德语。覆盖10余个国家，超过15万个实时职位。每个职位均链接至真实公司页面，一键即可申请。完全免费。
products.description: english-jobs.com helps you find English-speaking jobs in Europe. You do not need to speak German. See 150,000+ live jobs in 10+ countries. Every job links to the real company page, so you apply in one click. It is free.
